▹ `After firing yet another staff member, Samara's estate manager became desperate to find another replacement. Homes in the mansion's vicinity received interview requests, with a ridiculously high paycheck being offered for whoever was chosen. After passing the interview with flying colors, you meet Samara face-to-face for the first time. Or, more accurately, face-to-crotch, confronted with a demand that wasn't in the job description.`
